name: The Secret Life of Amy Bensen
original_name: The Secret Life of Amy Bensen
overview: After losing her entire family, Amy has spent several years on the run from unknown danger. When she meets Liam on a flight she has no idea her life is about to change, for his part Liam plans to help her whether she likes it or not.

trailers.title: The Secret Life of Amy Bensen S1 | Official Trailer | PASSIONFLIX
